title: Top 3 REITs For Recession And Inflation Protection
text: Inflation has not been this high for 40 years. The solution to our inflation problem, if it works at all, will not be painless.

title: Are You Looking for a High-Growth Dividend Stock?
text: Dividends are one of the best benefits to being a shareholder, but finding a great dividend stock is no easy task. Does Alexandria Real Estate Equities (ARE) have what it takes?

title: Alexandria Is Life Science Growth At An Office Discount
text: Office has been clobbered due to a mix of a rough market and legitimately weak fundamentals. Alexandria is nominally labeled office and has gotten pulled down with office in lock step.

title: Buy The Dip: 2 REITs Getting Way Too Cheap
text: We continue to buy the dips in many phases. Lately, we have been buying mainly REITs which are down heavily.

title: Why Alexandria Real Estate Equities (ARE) is a Great Dividend Stock Right Now
text: Dividends are one of the best benefits to being a shareholder, but finding a great dividend stock is no easy task. Does Alexandria Real Estate Equities (ARE) have what it takes?

title: Alexandria Real Estate: Pharma's Trusted Landlord
text: Alexandria Real Estate Equities is the longest tenured owner, operator, and developer of research-oriented facilities in key cluster markets. The REIT's tenant base includes some of the largest multinational pharmaceutical companies that are locked into long duration leases with built-in escalation clauses.

title: Alexandria (ARE) Rewards Investors, Hikes Dividend by 2.6%
text: Alexandria (ARE) boosts investors' confidence with a dividend hike of 2.6%. Robust operating results, a decent financial position and a lower payout ratio make the dividend rate sustainable.
